invite.subject: You're invited to join {companyName} on Tickin
invite.preheader: Set your password to activate your workspace login.
invite.heading: Welcome to {companyName}
invite.lede: You've been invited to join the workspace on Tickin. Click below to set your password and sign in.
invite.expiresNote: This invite link expires in 7 days.
invite.fallback: If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:

passwordReset.subject: Reset your Tickin password
passwordReset.heading: Reset your password
passwordReset.lede: We received a request to reset the password for your Tickin account. Click below to set a new one. If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

day0.subject: Action needed — your last Tickin payment didn't go through
day0.title: Your last payment didn't go through
day0.lede: We tried to charge the card on file for {companyName} and it failed. This can happen for a number of reasons (expired card, daily limit, bank declined). Update your payment method to keep things running.
day0.footer: If we can't take payment in the next 7 days, your workspace will pause. Nothing will be deleted; access will just be locked until billing is current.

day2.subject: Reminder: payment still pending for your Tickin workspace
day2.title: Payment still pending
day2.lede: Your last payment for {companyName} hasn't cleared yet. We've been retrying automatically, but the easiest fix is to update your payment method directly.
day2.footer: Access pauses on {graceEndsAt} unless this is resolved.

day5.subject: Final notice — your Tickin workspace pauses in 2 days
day5.title: Final notice: 2 days until your workspace pauses
day5.lede: Payment for {companyName} has been outstanding for 5 days. Update your card today or your workspace will be paused on {graceEndsAt}. Your data stays safe — only access is paused until billing is current.
day5.footer: Need to talk to someone? Reply to this email and we'll help.

common.unsubscribe: You're receiving this because billing for your Tickin workspace needs attention. Manage your subscription or contact us at info@tickin.pro.

salarySlip.subject: Your salary slip for {month}
salarySlip.heading: Salary slip — {month}
salarySlip.lede: Your salary slip for {month} is ready. The PDF is attached for your records.
salarySlip.footer: Questions about your slip? Reply to this email and your HR team will follow up.

weeklyReport.subject: Tickin weekly report — week of {weekStart}
weeklyReport.heading: Weekly summary
weeklyReport.lede: Here's what happened in your workspace this week.

monthlyReport.subject: Tickin monthly report — {month}
monthlyReport.heading: Monthly summary
monthlyReport.lede: Your monthly attendance and payroll summary for {month}.

paymentFailed.body: We tried to charge the card on file for *{companyName}* and it failed. Update your payment method to avoid a workspace pause in 8 days.
paymentFailed.footer: Your data is safe; only access pauses until billing is current.

otPrompt.title: Overtime detected
otPrompt.body: Hey {name}, looks like you went past your normal shift today. Confirm or adjust:

salarySlip.title: Salary Slip
salarySlip.confidential: Confidential — for the named employee only.
